title: Assumption
description: A professional assumption in the HVOS Assumptions & Adjustments Foundation. Deliberately non-rigid: the allowed categories and confidence levels are NOT enumerated here — they come from injectable configuration (engine.assumptions.config) so engagements can extend them without a schema change. This contract carries no valuation math and forces no decision. manual_override records a professional-judgment change while preserving the prior value for later audit. additionalProperties is allowed so extra engagement-specific fields can travel with the assumption.

assumption_id.description: Stable identifier. Auto-generated on creation if not supplied.

category.description: Assumption category (e.g. general, special, extraordinary). Validated against injectable config, not a fixed enum here.

statement.description: The assumption itself, in plain language.

basis.description: What the assumption rests on (evidence, instruction, market practice).

confidence_level.description: Stated confidence label (e.g. High/Medium/Low). Validated against injectable config, not a fixed enum here.

rationale.description: Why this assumption is held. Required so the assumption is explainable and auditable.

affected_method.description: Which valuation method the assumption affects. A label only — this contract performs no valuation.

sensitivity_link.description: Reference linking the assumption to a sensitivity range/scenario. A pointer only; no math here.

manual_override.description: Professional-judgment override. Records the change, the actor, the rationale and a snapshot of the prior value(s) so the original state is preserved for the audit trail.

changes.description: Per-field {from, to} diff applied by the override.

previous.description: Snapshot of the pre-override values for the changed fields.
